rules.description: RSA encryption detected - vulnerable to Shor's quantum algorithm
rules.remediation: Replace with NIST PQC standard: ML-KEM (FIPS 203) for key encapsulation, ML-DSA (FIPS 204) for digital signatures

fix_patterns.replace: /* TODO: Replace RSA with ML-KEM (FIPS 203) key encapsulation */
/* TODO: Replace RSA keygen with ML-KEM keypair generation */

rules.description: AES-128 detected - insufficient key length for quantum resistance (Grover's algorithm halves effective key size to 64-bit)
rules.remediation: Upgrade to AES-256 which maintains 128-bit quantum security

fix_patterns.replace: AES-256
aes_256

rules.description: MD5 hash function detected - cryptographically broken, collision attacks demonstrated
rules.remediation: Replace with SHA-256 or SHA-3 for cryptographic hashing

fix_patterns.replace: hashlib.sha3_256(
/* TODO: Replace MD5_CTX with EVP_MD_CTX using SHA-256 */
/* TODO: Replace MD5 with SHA-256 via EVP_DigestInit_ex */

rules.description: DES encryption detected - 56-bit key is trivially brute-forced
rules.remediation: Replace with AES-256-GCM for symmetric encryption

fix_patterns.replace: AES.new(  # TODO: Use AES-256-GCM instead of DES
EVP_aes_256_gcm  /* TODO: Replace DES with AES-256-GCM */

rules.description: SHA-1 hash function detected - collision attacks are practical (SHAttered)

fix_patterns.replace: hashlib.sha3_256(
SHA256( /* TODO: Upgraded from SHA-1 */

rules.description: Triple-DES detected - deprecated by NIST since 2023, vulnerable to Sweet32 attack

fix_patterns.replace: AES  # TODO: Replace 3DES with AES-256-GCM

rules.description: RC4 stream cipher detected - numerous biases make it completely broken

fix_patterns.replace: /* TODO: Replace RC4/ARC4 with ChaCha20-Poly1305 */

rules.description: Blowfish cipher detected - 64-bit block size vulnerable to birthday attacks
ECB cipher mode detected - deterministic encryption leaks plaintext patterns
rules.remediation: Use authenticated encryption (GCM mode) instead of ECB

fix_patterns.replace: MODE_GCM  # TODO: Switched from ECB to GCM
_gcm( /* TODO: Switched from ECB to GCM */

rules.description: PKCS#1 v1.5 padding detected - vulnerable to Bleichenbacher padding oracle attacks
rules.remediation: Use OAEP padding for RSA encryption, PSS for RSA signatures, or migrate to PQC

fix_patterns.replace: PKCS1_OAEP_PADDING /* TODO: Upgraded padding */

rules.description: DSA signature scheme detected - vulnerable to quantum attacks via Shor's algorithm
rules.remediation: Replace with ML-DSA (FIPS 204) for post-quantum digital signatures

rules.description: Elliptic Curve cryptography detected - vulnerable to quantum attacks via Shor's algorithm
rules.remediation: Replace ECDSA with ML-DSA (FIPS 204), ECDH with ML-KEM (FIPS 203)

rules.description: Diffie-Hellman key exchange detected - vulnerable to quantum attacks
rules.remediation: Replace with ML-KEM (FIPS 203) key encapsulation mechanism

rules.description: Weak random number generator detected - predictable output unsuitable for cryptography
rules.remediation: Use cryptographically secure RNG: OpenSSL RAND_bytes(), secrets module (Python), crypto.randomBytes (Node.js)

fix_patterns.replace: /* TODO: Replace rand() with RAND_bytes() for crypto use */
secrets.token_bytes( # TODO: Use secrets module for crypto

rules.description: Potential hardcoded credential or secret key detected
rules.remediation: Move secrets to environment variables or a secure vault (AWS Secrets Manager, HashiCorp Vault)

fix_patterns.replace: /* TODO: Move this secret to environment variables or a vault */

rules.description: Insecure HTTP URL detected - data transmitted in plaintext
rules.remediation: Use HTTPS for all network communication

fix_patterns.replace: https://

rules.description: Telnet protocol detected - transmits credentials and data in plaintext
rules.remediation: Replace with SSH for remote access

rules.description: SHA-224 hash detected - insufficient output length for quantum resistance
rules.remediation: Upgrade to SHA-256 or SHA-3 for adequate quantum security margin

fix_patterns.replace: sha256  # TODO: Upgraded from SHA-224
